query:
SELECT 
  p.id as product_id,
  p.name as product_name,
  p.sku,
  COUNT(pv.id) as total_batches,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pv.isDefault = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as default_batches,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN pv.isDefault = 1 THEN pv.variantCode ELSE NULL END) as default_variant_code
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.sku
ORDER BY p.id
LIMIT 20;

  p.id as product_id,
  p.name as product_name,
  p.sku,
  COUNT(pv.id) as total_batches,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pv.isDefault = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as default_batches,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN pv.isDefault = 1 THEN pv.variantCode ELSE NULL END) as default_variant_code
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.sku
ORDER BY p.id
LIMIT 20;
